worker.objective: Demonstrate DAG execution: writer produces output, reviewer consumes it.
instructions: Do not modify files; only read and report.
Agent output must be marked generated; no autonomous merge.

plans.objective: Write one sentence describing what this project (mimi-bro) does. Output to stdout or result only; do not create files.
Read the writer's output from works/ (same run, writer role) and say OK or one short improvement. Do not modify files.
